image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Billions of microbes call your skin home. Are they friends or foes?
Context visual: Your skin is a vibrant ecosystem. Most microbes are beneficial, but some can cause trouble.
Escalation visual: These microbes help protect you, but they can also react to harsh products.
Evidence visual: Studies suggest a balanced microbiome can improve skin health. But remember, research is ongoing.
Payoff visual: So, less is often more. Choose products wisely to support your skin's ecosystem.
Cta visual: Curious about your skin's health? Follow for more science-based insights!
